name: Vigil Postop Sentinel
description: Continuously monitors postop and postpartum patients for deterioration. Runs MEWT, qSOFA, and CDC ASE screens against FHIR vitals and labs, then drafts SBAR escalation notes for the clinical team.

skills.name: Monitor patient for deterioration
skills.description: End-to-end screen: pulls recent vitals and labs, runs MEWT + qSOFA + CDC ASE, and returns a structured alert with an SBAR note when any trigger fires.
examples: Check patient-42 for signs of deterioration in the last 4 hours.
Screen this postpartum patient for preeclampsia red flags and sepsis.

skills.name: Explain an existing alert
skills.description: Given a prior alert id, returns the evidence trail (which vitals, which criteria, which LLM rationale).
examples: Why did you escalate patient-42 at 12:01?
